title: Russian Omelette
description: A classic Russian omelette made with eggs, Russian sausage, and xerisic for added flavor.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the cooked sausage and xerisic to the pan and stir to combine.
Pour the eggs over the sausage and xerisic mixture.
Cook the omelette for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are almost set.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
